summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently. No shared canonical was selected. No close, merge, fix, or PR-raising actions are safe or allowed by this job; each open contributor PR remains on the maintainer review path or blocked by the exact missing proof/check state.

actions.reason: Focused contributor bug-fix PR with proof supplied and passing checks, but maintainer technical review is required and merge is blocked by job policy.
Useful focused contributor PR, but it requires maintainer technical correctness review and branch repair/merge readiness cannot be acted on in this close/comment/label-only job.
Open contributor PR has useful test coverage but includes broader implementation/generated changes that require maintainer review.
Useful candidate fix for an open issue, but maintainer review is required before any merge or fixed-by-candidate closeout.
Cannot close or advance this PR automatically: review did not complete and relevant checks are failing on the candidate branch.
